data.body:
## Description

Move the 3 duplicated reviewer prompt files from brainstorm/docs/reviewers/ and roadmap/docs/reviewers/ to a single shared location (plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/). Update both SKILL.md files to reference the new paths. Delete the duplicate copies.

Files to move:
- agent-clarity.md → plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/agent-clarity.md
- scope.md → plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/scope.md
- value.md → plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/value.md

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/agent-clarity.md (moved)
- CREATE: plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/scope.md (moved)
- CREATE: plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/value.md (moved)
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (path update)
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md (path update)
- REMOVE: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/docs/reviewers/ (3 files)
- REMOVE: plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/docs/reviewers/ (3 files)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Shared reviewer files exist
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/agent-clarity.md
- [ ] No duplicate copies remain
  Verify: { test -d $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/docs/reviewers; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] Both SKILL.md files reference shared path
  Verify: grep -q 'shared/docs/reviewers' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
